reviews.review_text: Jamie did amazing job great waiter!!!

Ate there a few weeks ago and it was amazing! The staff were so nice and welcoming. Our server Carlos was awesome and very efficient in making sure we had everything we needed and made our time there very enjoyable. Ask for Carlos when you go! 10/10
First time visiting not what I expected. This place is amazing food and the service is great. Worth a visit. This place did NOT disappoint.
Atmosphere nice, drinks good the steak seasoned well and tender the mash potatoes with the sauce very good, I can just order a whole side of the potatoes. Overall good experience

I highly recommend Casa Tequila. My family and I went looking for a Mexico World Cup game, but we had a truly excellent experience. Everything we ordered was delicious. My husband ordered the carne asada, my daughter the birria tacos, my son the sirloin, and I had a shrimp cocktail, and everything was absolutely delicious. The service was excellent, and Mario, our waiter, was incredibly friendly and efficient. I live in San Diego, but I will definitely return to Casa Tequila when I go back to Chicago.

Every time we arrive at this lovely place, everything is truly spectacular: the service, the bartender, the food, and their fantastic rice pudding. It's a truly better experience each time. Highly recommended.

I’ve been to Casa Tequila a few times, and I always have a great time. I usually order the quesabirra, which is my fav! This time, I ordered the chimichanga, which was just ok. My friend ordered a burrito, and he LOVED it! Overall, this is a great restaurant that I love to visit. It’s always clean with fast, reliable service. My server Jamie was exceptional this visit. He was very personable, continuously checked on us, and gave excellent drink recommendations. Looking forward to coming back!
Great experience, Jaime was a great server and made our night. Will definitely be back!

Ate there a few weeks ago and it was amazing! The staff were so nice and welcoming. Our server Carlos was awesome and very efficient in making sure we had everything we needed and made our time there very enjoyable. Ask for Carlos when you go! 10/10

I highly recommend Casa Tequila. My family and I went looking for a Mexico World Cup game, but we had a truly excellent experience. Everything we ordered was delicious. My husband ordered the carne asada, my daughter the birria tacos, my son the sirloin, and I had a shrimp cocktail, and everything was absolutely delicious. The service was excellent, and Mario, our waiter, was incredibly friendly and efficient. I live in San Diego, but I will definitely return to Casa Tequila when I go back to Chicago.

My friend ordered a burrito, and he LOVED it! Overall, this is a great restaurant that I love to visit. It’s always clean with fast, reliable service. My server Jamie was exceptional this visit. He was very personable, continuously checked on us, and gave excellent drink recommendations. Looking forward to coming back!

I recently visited Casa Tequila and it quickly became one of my favorite Mexican spots! From the moment you walk in, the vibrant atmosphere, colorful decor, and welcoming staff make you feel right at home.

Shout out to Jaime for making our visit memorable. Will definitely stop by again!
Atmosphere nice, drinks good the steak seasoned well and tender the mash potatoes with the sauce very good, I can just order a whole side of the potatoes. Overall good experience
Everything was delicious, the place was excellent, the atmosphere luxurious, perfect for any occasion, and Mario's service was outstanding.
Food was really great they got a good patio and great atmosphere inside

I highly recommend Casa Tequila. My family and I went looking for a Mexico World Cup game, but we had a truly excellent experience. Everything we ordered was delicious. My husband ordered the carne asada, my daughter the birria tacos, my son the sirloin, and I had a shrimp cocktail, and everything was absolutely delicious. The service was excellent, and Mario, our waiter, was incredibly friendly and efficient. I live in San Diego, but I will definitely return to Casa Tequila when I go back to Chicago.
Everything was delicious, the place was excellent, the atmosphere luxurious, perfect for any occasion, and Mario's service was outstanding.

I’ve been to Casa Tequila a few times, and I always have a great time. I usually order the quesabirra, which is my fav! This time, I ordered the chimichanga, which was just ok. My friend ordered a burrito, and he LOVED it! Overall, this is a great restaurant that I love to visit. It’s always clean with fast, reliable service. My server Jamie was exceptional this visit. He was very personable, continuously checked on us, and gave excellent drink recommendations. Looking forward to coming back!

First time coming here, Jaime’s service was very well. Very friendly and attentive.
Definitely coming here again.
The food and the service was excellent. Carlos was very attentive and very personable with us and other customers. We love this place.
Our server Jaime was super attentive and spot on. Was very detailed when we had question about the menu.

Discovered this place back in 2021 and since then have traveled from Peoria to Chicago for their authentic Mexican food and outstanding service. TONY bartender and connoisseur of craft cocktails, Tequila & Mezcal, amazing conversationalist and true passion for his craft!! Now CELE bartender and waiter, enthusiastic personality and always hits the mark with his food recommendations paired with the perfect cocktail! Olivia, charming waiter with great recommendations for Latin Nightlife. The crown jewel OWNER URIEL, magnificent host!! Always makes us feel welcomed, immense gratitude that in turn makes us feel appreciated.

We both love and always on the hunt for authentic Mexican restaurants that check all our boxes. This place is a must and never disappoints. Well worth our drive and time spent there.

Our perspective comes from a Mexican cultural ethnicity along with modern and a true admiration for those business whom exude authenticity, hard work and quality over quantity.

***We were too immersed in our experience we completely forgot to take pictures ***

This was our first time in Chicago fans we are here for 3 days. We didn’t know where to eat we tried a decent place for lunch but for dinner we decided to come try Casa Tequila. I can honestly say we hit the jackpot. The atmosphere food and service are excellent. We were lucky enough that the bartender Tony was also our server. He treated us great !!!!! He took the time to explain the menu and all the specials. But what I enjoyed the most was that he introduced me to a whole new cocktail experience. We are going to be back tomorrow and the next day. Highly recommended this place you won’t be disappointed.

First time at Casa Tequila. Quality service, great atmosphere. Sat at the bar. Tony was fantastic. Very knowledgeable on tequilas. Multiple birthday celebrations going on. House Margarita on the rocks with Tajin is a must. Big serving of queso fundido was tasty. Many specials weekly at this spot including a live mariachi band. Solid spot will be back.

Our service was great! However, the host at the time (Jaime) was rude to one of the servers and that gave me a very bad impression. The server was trying to explain him something and he cut her off very rudely. That gave me a very awful environment

We went for my aunts birthdays w a party of 13, the server was pretty nice until we got out check . One of my aunts asked to pay separate for js her and her kids and spouse. When the server came back with the check she only came w two , we were co fused cs we never said we were all going to pay tg . The server told my mom to write down who’s meal was in each check HERSELF and told us that there were only allowed two checks for in total per party the bartender told my mom that’s how things are done in Chicago (because we are here from kcmo) honestly the whole thing was stressful and unnecessary we won’t be coming back because of the lack of decent of asking if there was going to be more than one check or at least telling us in the beginning before even getting our order that only two checks were allowed

yall played g, it looked good BUT my food was cold and unseasoned

The food is good but it’s definitely not worth how expensive it is. Charging $30 for burritos, $60 for steaks and $20 for margaritas is ridiculous. And the service is also quite poor. Have to explain my order numerous times

My experience wasn't the best. The girl who served me at the bar was very friendly, but there was a moment when I asked the manager something and he answered very rudely and it was clear he wasn't in the mood, and he left me hanging. I felt super uncomfortable. Maybe I was just having a bad day. 👍

Ate there a few weeks ago and it was amazing! The staff were so nice and welcoming. Our server Carlos was awesome and very efficient in making sure we had everything we needed and made our time there very enjoyable. Ask for Carlos when you go! 10/10

Ate there a few weeks ago and it was amazing! The staff were so nice and welcoming. Our server Carlos was awesome and very efficient in making sure we had everything we needed and made our time there very enjoyable. Ask for Carlos when you go! 10/10

This was our first time at this restaurant and the vibe was amazing The server Carlos was amazing  our first time here was 10/10 food hot and delicious thanks Carlos for making this experience a special experience
Great service very attentive.! Our waiter Lucio C was great. Food was 10/10 will definitely be back GIRLS NIGHT was a success.! Definitely reserve your table we had no wait what so ever.!
The service and food was great here. Our waiter Lucio was excellent. Definitely recommend and coming back for sure! Our girls night was successful!
Lucio was amazing , he deserves a raise he never fails me 🙏🏾💪🏾
Jamie was great!!!! 10/10

I’ve been to Casa Tequila a few times, and I always have a great time. I usually order the quesabirra, which is my fav! This time, I ordered the chimichanga, which was just ok. My friend ordered a burrito, and he LOVED it! Overall, this is a great restaurant that I love to visit. It’s always clean with fast, reliable service. My server Jamie was exceptional this visit. He was very personable, continuously checked on us, and gave excellent drink recommendations. Looking forward to coming back!
Jaime was great and caring for us the whole night. He made our night memorable. Will be back for another great experience 🥰🥰
Our server Jaime was super attentive and spot on. Was very detailed when we had question about the menu.

This was our first time in Chicago fans we are here for 3 days. We didn’t know where to eat we tried a decent place for lunch but for dinner we decided to come try Casa Tequila. I can honestly say we hit the jackpot. The atmosphere food and service are excellent. We were lucky enough that the bartender Tony was also our server. He treated us great !!!!! He took the time to explain the menu and all the specials. But what I enjoyed the most was that he introduced me to a whole new cocktail experience. We are going to be back tomorrow and the next day. Highly recommended this place you won’t be disappointed.

First time at Casa Tequila. Quality service, great atmosphere. Sat at the bar. Tony was fantastic. Very knowledgeable on tequilas. Multiple birthday celebrations going on. House Margarita on the rocks with Tajin is a must. Big serving of queso fundido was tasty. Many specials weekly at this spot including a live mariachi band. Solid spot will be back.

This was our first time at this restaurant and the vibe was amazing The server Carlos was amazing  our first time here was 10/10 food hot and delicious thanks Carlos for making this experience a special experience
Great service from Lucio! Food was amazing! Successful girls night out.!
Kevin was a fantastic server.  He was very prompt and took great care of us.  Food was fantastic and huge servings.  So glad we found this gem on Google.  It was worth leaving downtown for!
Atmosphere nice, drinks good the steak seasoned well and tender the mash potatoes with the sauce very good, I can just order a whole side of the potatoes. Overall good experience

The food is good but it’s definitely not worth how expensive it is. Charging $30 for burritos, $60 for steaks and $20 for margaritas is ridiculous. And the service is also quite poor. Have to explain my order numerous times
Mario one of the best servers enjoyed my experience and service great steak by the way

The food is good but it’s definitely not worth how expensive it is. Charging $30 for burritos, $60 for steaks and $20 for margaritas is ridiculous. And the service is also quite poor. Have to explain my order numerous times

House Margarita on the rocks with Tajin is a must. Big serving of queso fundido was tasty. Many specials weekly at this spot including a live mariachi band. Solid spot will be back.
Love this place. Margaritas Mondays are a great deal and the Spivey margaritas are phenomenal. If you’re hungry their enchiladas suizas with ground beef would be my recommendation!

First time at Casa Tequila. Quality service, great atmosphere. Sat at the bar. Tony was fantastic. Very knowledgeable on tequilas. Multiple birthday celebrations going on. House Margarita on the rocks with Tajin is a must. Big serving of queso fundido was tasty. Many specials weekly at this spot including a live mariachi band. Solid spot will be back.
tony is the best bartender and has the best tequila suggestions! such good queso fundido. we are local and will definitely be back.

This is my favorite Mexican restaurant by a landslide. Tony and Uriel are the kindest and always make sure you feel right at home during your dining experience.
I always get a tortilla soup, queso dip, shredded chicken quesadilla , quesa-birra tacos and it’s phenomenal everytime. I always bring my friends and family here and every meal is so authentic and tasty.
I absolutely love this place, the service is always great, atmosphere and food is amazing!!

The food is good but it’s definitely not worth how expensive it is. Charging $30 for burritos, $60 for steaks and $20 for margaritas is ridiculous. And the service is also quite poor. Have to explain my order numerous times

I’ve been to Casa Tequila a few times, and I always have a great time. I usually order the quesabirra, which is my fav! This time, I ordered the chimichanga, which was just ok. My friend ordered a burrito, and he LOVED it! Overall, this is a great restaurant that I love to visit. It’s always clean with fast, reliable service. My server Jamie was exceptional this visit. He was very personable, continuously checked on us, and gave excellent drink recommendations. Looking forward to coming back!

Ok it’s been such a long time since I’ve had this quality of service as well as food as well as atmosphere!! Our food was not only fantastic but it came out hot fresh and most importantly melted in my mouth! The sampler platter is enough for you and a date! But after tasting the food I ordered a steak burrito that came out so hot and fresh and great tasting I’m ranting and raving now! Our server Kevin was not only attentive and friendly and just great he needs a raise!! Make home a manager because he is great and provides such a great environment! I will not only be back soon but I’m a regular now!!

The food is good but it’s definitely not worth how expensive it is. Charging $30 for burritos, $60 for steaks and $20 for margaritas is ridiculous. And the service is also quite poor. Have to explain my order numerous times
Love this place. Margaritas Mondays are a great deal and the Spivey margaritas are phenomenal. If you’re hungry their enchiladas suizas with ground beef would be my recommendation!
Love the quesabirrias and the margaritas. Super cool vibe

I highly recommend Casa Tequila. My family and I went looking for a Mexico World Cup game, but we had a truly excellent experience. Everything we ordered was delicious. My husband ordered the carne asada, my daughter the birria tacos, my son the sirloin, and I had a shrimp cocktail, and everything was absolutely delicious. The service was excellent, and Mario, our waiter, was incredibly friendly and efficient. I live in San Diego, but I will definitely return to Casa Tequila when I go back to Chicago.
